English.title: # Ollama WebUI
English.status_display_msg: Displaying the model status or an error message.
English.enter_question: Enter your question or upload an image with your question...
English.default_start_setting: Make the new host the default.
English.settings_note: All settings live here and apply immediately after saving.
English.search_results_info: How many web search results to use for answer grounding
English.search_summary_info: Controls how detailed search summaries should be
English.preset_placeholder: Create or update a custom preset
English.tool_commands:
**Tool Commands**  
`/tools`  
`/tool calculator {"expression":"2+3*4"}`  
`/tool datetime {}`  
`/tool web_search {"query":"latest ollama news","num_results":3}`  
`/tool fetch_url {"url":"https://example.com"}`
English.web_search_setting_failed: Failed to save web search setting.

Chinese.title: # Ollama WebUI
Chinese.status_display_msg: 顯示模型狀態或錯誤訊息。
Chinese.enter_question: 輸入你的問題，或上傳圖片並搭配問題一起送出……
Chinese.ai_server_name: 新的 AI 主機名稱
Chinese.ai_server_name_msg: 例如：GMK-K9，可在 server_settings.json 中手動編輯。
Chinese.settings_note: 所有設定集中在這裡，儲存後即生效。
Chinese.search_results_info: 回答時用多少筆搜尋結果作為參考
Chinese.search_summary_info: 控制搜尋摘要的詳細程度
Chinese.tavily_api_key_placeholder: 貼上 Tavily API 金鑰
Chinese.serper_api_key_placeholder: 貼上 Serper.dev API 金鑰
Chinese.persona_description_placeholder: 簡短說明這個角色的用途
Chinese.prompt_content_placeholder: 在這裡輸入可重複使用的提示詞
Chinese.temperature_info: 請選擇 0 到 1 之間的數值
Chinese.tool_commands:
**工具指令**  
`/tools`  
`/tool calculator {"expression":"2+3*4"}`  
`/tool datetime {}`  
`/tool web_search {"query":"latest ollama news","num_results":3}`  
`/tool fetch_url {"url":"https://example.com"}`
Chinese.web_search_setting_failed: 儲存網頁搜尋設定失敗。
Chinese.llm_settings_saved: 已將 LLM 設定儲存到 server_settings.json。
Chinese.llm_settings_save_failed: 儲存 LLM 設定失敗。
